claim: Queue depth is primarily load accounting
evidence: queue_depth_per_created_completed_balance_mean is 1.0 in every grid cell; queue per created rises with pressure and falls with service
current_decision: Treat raw queue depth as a baseline load observable, not an emergent lobe claim
confound: Creation pressure is implemented through create_task action weight, so demand and action mix may be coupled
next_falsification_test: Add action/load accounting for created, completed, completion fraction, create/work/idle/message counts, work events, and queue-per-created-completed balance

claim: Service capacity absorbs load at fixed pressure
current_decision: Keep service capacity as a mechanism-discriminating axis
confound: Effects are point estimates over seeds 70..99; paired uncertainty has not been reported
next_falsification_test: Add paired seed-bootstrap intervals and sign stability while preserving each seed's full 3x3 grid

claim: Creation pressure increases normalized backlog at fixed service
current_decision: Demand pressure remains a robust load driver after normalizing by created tasks
confound: Higher pressure may also change effective work opportunity through action competition
next_falsification_test: Run a preregistered exogenous-arrival decoupling test after analysis controls

evidence: Extreme-minus-normal pressure transition-entropy deltas: -1.166135, -1.292786, -0.702994; max-dwell deltas: 5.3, 5.266667, 3; backlog-growth dwell-share deltas: 0.255555, 0.375, 0.427778
current_decision: Treat this as the main residual candidate dynamics signal
confound: backlog_growth labels are partly derived from queue movement and action dominance
next_falsification_test: Add a label-count-preserving null control and compare observed-minus-null dwell, transition count, and entropy

evidence: High-minus-low service-capacity transition-entropy deltas: 0.337663, 0.665824, 0.800804; max-dwell deltas: -1.533333, -3.933333, -3.833333; backlog-growth dwell-share deltas: -0.322223, -0.213889, -0.15
current_decision: Keep the residual-locking hypothesis alive, but state it as partially load-mediated
confound: Raw and normalized entropy are sensitive to label prevalence and transition counts
next_falsification_test: Report normalized entropy alongside a label-count null, then inspect whether observed locking survives
